---
title: "About"
---

About this site

I began the pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics to strengthen my data-driven decision making skills. By acquirung my Bachelor's degree in chemical engineering, I entered with a strong foundation in fluid mechanics, process kinetics, thermodynamics, and air pollution control. My goal is to use these degrees as a bridge between business development and the engineering mindset to pursue my interest in process improvement and optimization.
